Description: Bloodletter Drudge Charm tier line. Replicates DrudgeCharm_TierWeenies_World.sql + DrudgeCharm_SunstoneUnderlay_2026-05-08.sql at runtime, plus per-tier UiEffects glows: white / green / blue / purple. No SQL deployment required.

Weenies.Notes: Regular tier. Sunstone IconUnderlay + white (Frost=128) UiEffects glow.

PropertiesString.Name: Bloodletter Drudge Charm
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Collectors and Trophy Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these charms.

Weenies.Notes: Quality tier. Sunstone underlay + green (Acid=256) glow. NPCs that accept 24835 also accept this WCID via the Give-emote mirror.

PropertiesString.Name: Bloodletter Drudge Charm (Quality)
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Collectors and Trophy Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these charms.

Weenies.Notes: Pristine tier. Sunstone underlay + blue (Magical=1) glow. Inherits Collector NPC acceptance from 24835 via emote mirror.

PropertiesString.Name: Bloodletter Drudge Charm (Pristine)
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Collectors and Trophy Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these charms.

Weenies.Notes: Perfect tier. Sunstone underlay + purple (Lightning=64) glow. Inherits Collector NPC acceptance from 24835 via emote mirror.

PropertiesString.Name: Bloodletter Drudge Charm (Perfect)
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Collectors and Trophy Collectors will reward a great deal of experience and pyreals for turning in these charms.
